title: Master v0.4.4 Account Card Selection Fix
notes:
Fixes Access Control account card selection so accounts can be selected and deleted from Master.

Changes:
- Adds account card data-username repair.
- Clicking anywhere on an account card selects it.
- Adds stronger selection binding after Access Control loads.
- Keeps temp key selection working.
- Keeps revoke/delete temp key cleanup tools.
- Keeps delete account cleanup tool.
